---
title: "print_fn_info"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/ti/src/branch/main/R/utils-misc.R#L78)

# `print_fn_info()`

Prints function header info

## Usage

```r
print_fn_info(x)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `x` | ti or segment obj |

## Value

print
